SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.smtp

Class FileMessageSource

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.smtp.FileMessageSource
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageSource, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
RefCountedFileMessageSource
public class FileMessageSource extends Object implements MessageSource, Serializable
File-backed envelope message source.
